import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { events } from '../../data/events'; import { models } from '../../data/models'; import EventCard from '../../components/EventCard/EventCard'; import ModelCard from '../../components/ModelCard/ModelCard'; import './Home.css'; function Home() { const featuredEvents = events.slice(0, 3); const featuredModels = models.slice(0, 3); return (
